# Weaver Design System (`weaver-ui-joyui`)

> A custom internal design system shipped as a Joy UI theme. Wrap an app with `<WeaverProvider>` and all `@mui/joy` components match the Weaver Figma designs. Current MVP scope: Blue theme, Light mode, Default radius, Inter font, no RTL. This file is the discovery entry point for any LLM working in a project that depends on this package.

## Setup

```tsx
import { WeaverProvider } from "weaver-ui-joyui";

export default function App({ children }) {
  return <WeaverProvider>{children}</WeaverProvider>;
}
```

- Standard components: `import { Button, Input, Checkbox } from "@mui/joy"`
- Custom components: `import { WeaverProvider, WeaverPagination, WeaverDatePicker, WeaverCalendar } from "weaver-ui-joyui"`

## Figma-to-Code Rules

The canonical Figma-to-code rules live at:

- **`node_modules/weaver-ui-joyui/RULES.md`** — component mappings (Tag→Chip, Toggle→Switch, …), button variant matrix (10 variants × 4 sizes), color mappings, icon conventions, 8 mandatory rules. **This file updates with every package version.**

For Claude Code, a thin trigger skill ships at `node_modules/weaver-ui-joyui/.claude/skills/weaver-figma/SKILL.md`. Install it once per consumer project:

```bash
cp -r node_modules/weaver-ui-joyui/.claude/skills/weaver-figma .claude/skills/weaver-figma
```

After copying, Claude Code auto-loads the skill whenever the user mentions Figma, shares a Figma URL, or uses Figma MCP tools (manual invocation: `/weaver-figma`). The skill itself is a pointer — its body simply tells the agent to read `RULES.md` and `llms.txt` from the installed package — so engineers do **not** need to re-copy the skill when the rules change. Bump the package version and the rules update automatically.

For tools that don't read Claude Code skills (Cursor, Windsurf, ChatGPT, etc.), point them directly at `node_modules/weaver-ui-joyui/RULES.md` and this `llms.txt`.

## Available Themed Components

All imported from `@mui/joy` unless noted; styling is automatic inside `<WeaverProvider>`:

- **Buttons:** Button, IconButton, ButtonGroup
- **Inputs:** Input, Textarea, Select, Option, FormControl, FormLabel, FormHelperText
- **Selection:** Checkbox, Radio, RadioGroup, Switch, Slider
- **Data Display:** Chip, Badge, Avatar, AvatarGroup, Table, Divider, Tooltip
- **Feedback:** Alert, LinearProgress, CircularProgress, Skeleton, Snackbar
- **Surfaces:** Card, CardContent, CardOverflow, Sheet, Modal, ModalDialog, ModalClose, Drawer
- **Navigation:** Tabs, TabList, Tab, Link, Breadcrumbs, List, ListItem, ListItemButton, ListDivider, ListSubheader
- **Layout:** Accordion, AccordionGroup, AccordionSummary, AccordionDetails
- **Dialog:** DialogTitle, DialogContent, DialogActions
- **Custom (from `weaver-ui-joyui`):** WeaverPagination, WeaverDatePicker, WeaverCalendar

## Custom Components

- **`WeaverPagination`** — page navigation control matching the Weaver Pagination spec.
- **`WeaverDatePicker`** — `mode="single" | "range"`, sizes `xs|sm|md`, native date math (no extra deps), `calendarPos` for popover placement (`top-left`/`top-center`/`top-right`/`bottom-left`/`bottom-center`/`bottom-right`, defaults to `bottom-center`), optional `todayLabel?: string` to swap the formatted trigger for a literal label when the selected value is today.
- **`WeaverCalendar`** — inline calendar; use when the calendar should always be visible.

## Typography

Use Joy UI's `<Typography level="...">` from `@mui/joy`. Font: Inter. Default text color: `content-default` (`#101B2E`) — never override with `#000`.

- **Body:** `body-md` (default), `body-sm`, `body-xs`, `body-2xs`, `body-3xs`, `body-lg`, `body-xl`
- **Heading:** `h1`, `h2`, `h3`, `h4`
- **Title:** `title-lg`, `title-md`, `title-sm`

## Icons

- Library: **Remix Icon** via `@remixicon/react` (not bundled — install separately: `npm install @remixicon/react`)
- Import: `import { RiSearchLine } from "@remixicon/react"`
- Default size: 20px
- Pass as `startDecorator` / `endDecorator` props on themed components
- Browse the full set at remixicon.com

## Limitations (current MVP)

- Light mode only (Figma has Light + Dark)
- Blue theme only (Figma has Blue, Gray, Brown, Yellow)
- Default radius only (Figma has Default, Rounded, Sharp)
- Inter font only (Figma has Inter, Geist, Mono, Alexandria)
- No RTL support
- Icons not bundled — install `@remixicon/react`

## Distribution

Not on npm. Each release is published as a versioned tarball to Google Cloud Storage. Consumers depend on a versioned URL like:

```json
"weaver-ui-joyui": "https://storage.googleapis.com/noon-toolbox/perm/weaver/weaver-ui-joyui-0.1.9.tgz"
```

Bump the version in the URL to pick up a new release. Version history is maintained internally by the design system team.

## Files in this package

- `RULES.md` — canonical Figma-to-code rules (updates with every release)
- `llms.txt` — this file: design system catalog
- `CLAUDE.md` — package context for AI assistants (slim pointer)
- `.claude/skills/weaver-figma/SKILL.md` — Claude Code trigger skill (thin pointer to `RULES.md` + `llms.txt`)
- `dist/` — compiled theme (CSS variables + theme object + custom components)
